description: Style NoteIf cool is your middle name, this denim and synthetic leather bag from wac by wrangler belongs in your collection. Perfect for college or just hanging out with friends, carry this along wherever you go and flaunt your trendy style statement.Height: 25 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 20 cmProduct DetailsMade of blended fabric and synthetic leather for enhanced durabilityLarge and roomy main compartment with a small zipped pocket and a mobile pouch for stowing away essentialsTwo short synthetic leather for carrying easeA ruched effect at the sides which can be extended to make the bag bigger with more spaceNylon bonded thread for long lifeBranding embroidered on the frontMaterial and CareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt SizeHeight: 25 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 20 cm   Height: 25 cm Width: 39 cm Depth: 20 cm
